steps.title: Identify both bounds
steps.content: The speed varied between $135$ miles per hour and $160$ miles per hour. That means $s$ can be equal to the lower speed, equal to the upper speed, or any speed between them. So $s$ is at least $135$ and at most $160$.

steps.title: Write the compound inequality
steps.content: A compound inequality can place the variable between the lower and upper bounds. Put $135$ on the left because it is the least possible speed, and put $160$ on the right because it is the greatest possible speed: $$135\leq s\leq160$$ The answer is D.
